html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Dragon Fruit Vine is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Bulbous Seeds (also named Dragon Fruit Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow a Dragon Fruit Vine by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite seasons are Spring and Summer, so in Autumn and Winter it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Dragon Fruit and 0-2 Bulbous/Dragon Fruit Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Dragon Fruit, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Dragon Fruits and 2-3 Bulbous/Dragon Fruit Seeds.

The Dragon Fruit stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Dragon Fruit stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Dragon Fruit Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Dragon Fruit Vine grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

This plant has a special ability, which is being immune to fire.

Gallery

  • Dragon Fruit Vine in Plant Registry.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Dragon Fruit Vine''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Bulbous Seeds|Bulbous Seeds]] (also named Dragon Fruit Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow a Dragon Fruit Vine by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite seasons are [[Spring]] and [[Summer]], so in [[Autumn]] and [[Winter]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Dragon Fruit/DST|Dragon Fruit]] and 0-2 Bulbous/Dragon Fruit Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Dragon Fruit|Giant Dragon Fruit]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Dragon Fruits and 2-3 Bulbous/Dragon Fruit Seeds.

The Dragon Fruit stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Dragon Fruit stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Dragon Fruit Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Dragon Fruit Vine grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.

This plant has a special ability, which is being immune to fire.
